title: Taxi!
question: 把今天课文里“特殊交通服务很厉害，但安全更重要”的线索放进现代场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个提醒各填一个空、用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: Our service can go to many unusual places. It can carry several passengers. But I cannot take you there today. The trip is too dangerous, and safety is more important.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 介绍服务：这是一项不寻常的交通服务

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明能力：它可以载几名乘客，也可以去不寻常的地方
options.english_template: It can carry several ___ and go to unusual places.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 礼貌拒绝：今天不能带你去，因为那趟旅程太危险
options.english_template: I cannot take you there today because the trip is ___.
